Operation.xpath: Defs/ThingDef[(defName="GroundPenetratingScanner" or defName="LongRangeMineralScanner" or defName="OrbitalScanner" or comps/li[contains(@Class, 'Scanner') or contains(compClass, 'Scanner')]) and defName != "SolarWeb-Stratum-RooftopScannerBooster"]/comps/li[@Class="CompProperties_AffectedByFacilities"]/linkableFacilities

match.xpath: Defs/ThingDef[(defName="GroundPenetratingScanner" or defName="LongRangeMineralScanner" or defName="OrbitalScanner" or comps/li[contains(@Class, 'Scanner') or contains(compClass, 'Scanner')]) and defName != "SolarWeb-Stratum-RooftopScannerBooster"]/comps/li[@Class="CompProperties_AffectedByFacilities"]/linkableFacilities

Operation.xpath: Defs/ThingDef[(defName="GroundPenetratingScanner" or defName="LongRangeMineralScanner" or defName="OrbitalScanner" or comps/li[contains(@Class, 'Scanner') or contains(compClass, 'Scanner')]) and defName != "SolarWeb-Stratum-RooftopScannerBooster"]/comps/li[@Class="CompProperties_AffectedByFacilities"]

nomatch.xpath: Defs/ThingDef[(defName="GroundPenetratingScanner" or defName="LongRangeMineralScanner" or defName="OrbitalScanner" or comps/li[contains(@Class, 'Scanner') or contains(compClass, 'Scanner')]) and defName != "SolarWeb-Stratum-RooftopScannerBooster"]/comps

Operation.xpath: Defs/ThingDef[(defName="GroundPenetratingScanner" or defName="LongRangeMineralScanner" or defName="OrbitalScanner" or comps/li[contains(@Class, 'Scanner') or contains(compClass, 'Scanner')]) and defName != "SolarWeb-Stratum-RooftopScannerBooster"]/placeWorkers

match.xpath: Defs/ThingDef[(defName="GroundPenetratingScanner" or defName="LongRangeMineralScanner" or defName="OrbitalScanner" or comps/li[contains(@Class, 'Scanner') or contains(compClass, 'Scanner')]) and defName != "SolarWeb-Stratum-RooftopScannerBooster"]/placeWorkers[not(li="PlaceWorker_ShowFacilitiesConnections")]

nomatch.xpath: Defs/ThingDef[(defName="GroundPenetratingScanner" or defName="LongRangeMineralScanner" or defName="OrbitalScanner" or comps/li[contains(@Class, 'Scanner') or contains(compClass, 'Scanner')]) and defName != "SolarWeb-Stratum-RooftopScannerBooster"]

Operation.xpath: Defs/ThingDef[(defName="GroundPenetratingScanner" or defName="LongRangeMineralScanner" or defName="OrbitalScanner" or comps/li[contains(@Class, 'Scanner') or contains(compClass, 'Scanner')]) and defName != "SolarWeb-Stratum-RooftopScannerBooster"]/statBases

match.xpath: Defs/ThingDef[(defName="GroundPenetratingScanner" or defName="LongRangeMineralScanner" or defName="OrbitalScanner" or comps/li[contains(@Class, 'Scanner') or contains(compClass, 'Scanner')]) and defName != "SolarWeb-Stratum-RooftopScannerBooster"]/statBases[not(SolarWeb-Stratum-ScanSpeed)]

nomatch.xpath: Defs/ThingDef[(defName="GroundPenetratingScanner" or defName="LongRangeMineralScanner" or defName="OrbitalScanner" or comps/li[contains(@Class, 'Scanner') or contains(compClass, 'Scanner')]) and defName != "SolarWeb-Stratum-RooftopScannerBooster"]
